ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine */,
  "grape_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grape variety used */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the wine */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Color of the wine (e.g., red, white) */,
  "aroma" TEXT /* Aroma profile of the wine */,
  "vintage_year" INTEGER /* Vintage year of the wine */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the wine bottle (e.g., 750ml, 1.5L) */,
  "srp" REAL /* Suggested retail price of the wine */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the grapes were harvested */,
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winery where the wine was produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_grape_id FOREIGN KEY ("grape_id") REFERENCES grapes ("grape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grapes" (
  "grape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grape variety */,
  "grape_name" TEXT /* Name of the grape variety */,
  "grape_color" TEXT /* Color of the grapes */,
  "grape_description" TEXT /* Description of the grape variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., region, vineyard) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the origin */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the origin */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type of the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being produced */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Quantity of wine produced in the batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was produced */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Unique batch number */,
  "batch_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production batch */,
  "batch_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production batch */,
  "winemaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winemaker responsible for the batch */,
  "quality_check_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality check (e.g., Pending, Passed, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_winemaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("winemaker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being assessed */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Tasting notes for the wine */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the wine based on quality criteria (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Initial, Final, Random Check) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the wine was assessed */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the wine was assessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine in stock */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wine currently in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the wine is stored */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Shelf life of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasting_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tasting event */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being tasted */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the tasting event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Public, Private, Trade) */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_events_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Winemaker, Quality Control, Admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the wine (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments from the user regarding the wine */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title for the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_reviews_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
